shot_notes: The alliance is formalized, and Carter is embraced by the royal family as a savior.
evidence_summary: To conclude the arc with a formal political and emotional resolution.

A grand triumphal procession enters Helium. Carter, Tars Tarkas, and Thark leaders are received by Jeddak Tardos Mors. The alliance is formalized, and Carter is embraced by the royal family as a savior.
Slow tracking shots of the procession
Medium shots of the formal greeting
Close-ups of the royal family's embrace
